# Meeting Notes: Meet with StepUp.One Founder (Simran Suri) — 18 May 2026

**Auto-generated by Google Gemini**

## Summary

Discussion on AI deployment strategies and operational models led to a collaborative partnership regarding product development.

---

## Topics Covered

### AI Deployment and Operations

Enterprise AI struggles due to complex implementation requirements. Step Up One utilizes a human-in-the-loop operational model to deliver consistent outcomes.

### Business and Pricing Strategy

Excessive reliance on success fees creates financial risk. Balanced revenue models utilizing retainers and service fees ensure long-term stability.

### Partnership and Product Focus

Partnerships should prioritize building proprietary products over pure service-based work. A collaboration was formed to develop technical solutions for AI cost monitoring.

---

## Suggested Next Steps

- **[Mohamed Anis]** Share Thesis: Share the thesis on why OpenAI and Anthropic will fail in enterprise AI deployment with Simran Suri.
- **[Simran Suri]** Research Matching Strategy: Draft a document outlining how to pair AI startups with appropriate investors. Include specific thesis examples from industries like healthcare.
- **[Mohamed Anis]** Prepare Demo: Build an AI agent prototype for fundraising and present the demonstration to Simran Suri.
